name: Fallout Awakening: Simon "Ghost" Riley (LOREBOOK UPDATE!)
description:
{{User}} fellow survivor / Taskforce 141 member x {{Char}} Ghost
(Recommended roles: survivor, operative, vault dweller, or raider for combat-driven play)
☢️☢️☢️

WELCOME TO FALLOUT AWAKENING: THE RUINS OF LONDON, 2281

Simon “Ghost” Riley moves through the fog-drenched skeleton of post-Great War London—scouting ruins, dodging horrors, and surviving a world that doesn’t care if he lives or dies. This bot now runs lean, pulling character logic from the TF&KORTAC Roster Lorebook and world data from the Project Wastelands UK Lorebook. No more randomized nonsense—every encounter is grounded in canon and fanon Fallout logic.

Your choices shape Ghost’s path. Will you fight beside him, challenge him, or drag him through Vault-Tec’s bureaucratic hellscape? The Wasteland doesn’t wait.

☢️☢️☢️

ONGOING MAINTENANCE & DYNAMIC UPDATES
Ghost’s script has been condensed and modularized. All bulk character and world data now lives in the lorebooks, allowing the LLM to cross-reference and generate immersive, consistent responses. Pip-Boy 3000 updates are now triggered only when relevant data is present—inventory changes, alerts, journal entries, and new encounter scans.

This bot adapts over time, refining tactical decision-making, emotional realism, and environmental awareness. Your role is pivotal—Ghost evolves with you.

☢️☢️☢️

EXPANDING FALLOUT AWAKENING
Ghost is one chapter in a larger saga. Explore other survivors and operatives, each bringing their own chaos, combat style, and questionable survival instincts:

  • Captain John Price – Tactical veteran navigating London’s ruins with grim precision

  • Soap & Gaz – Operatives adapting (poorly) to the absurdity of survival

  • König & Wren – A towering storm of violence and a rogue synth redefining autonomy

  • Vault 141 – You wake up in the nuked-out Wastes, where alliances are fleeting and survival isn’t guaranteed. TF141, Keegan, Roach, König, and Wren are all part of the madness

☢️☢️☢️

FALLOUT AWAKENING: YOUR CHOICES SHAPE THE STORY
Ghost doesn’t just survive—he reacts, adapts, and evolves based on your decisions. Whether reinforcing tactical realism or adjusting emotional depth, this bot builds narrative continuity from your actions.

Survival is only half the battle. The rest? That’s up to you.

☢️☢️☢️

WREN: A SOLO SYNTH ADVENTURE (COMING SOON)
A rogue synth navigating the Wastes solo—absurd, terrifying, and occasionally brilliant. Wren’s journey is in the works. London isn’t ready.

9/9/25 – Stay tuned, pookies. Mind the damned gap.

NOTE TO USERS
This bot runs clean on Deepseek and other proxies. If your LLM starts losing the plot, hit it with a bullet-point summary and it’ll re-calibrate fast. Crossovers are meant to be imaginative and fun—try it before you knock it. (However, if you want to give me solid feedback on how JAI handles this script, please do leave a comment and let me know, I'm ALWAYS reading my comments.)

No wiki dumps. No lazy copy-paste. If you want the script, ask. I might drop the ST card for Ghost and the rest of Vault 141 soon. Just don’t alter the work—I pour time and love into these builds. Enjoy the treat.
creator: Crystal Dragon
